# cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_layout

**Function**

Returns the layout at the specified index in the layer capabilities.

## Declaration

```swift
cp_layer_renderer_layout cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_layout(cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_t layer_capabilities, cp_supported_layouts_options options, size_t index);
```

## Parameters

- **layer_capabilities**: The layer capabilities to query.
- **options**: A bitmask of options that correspond to layout capabilities. Specify the same options you passed to the [doc://com.apple.compositorservices/documentation/CompositorServices/cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_layouts_count] function.
- **index**: A zero-based index into the list of supported layouts. This index must be less than the value the [doc://com.apple.compositorservices/documentation/CompositorServices/cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_layouts_count] function returns.

## Return Value

The layout at the specified index.

## Discussion

Use this function to determine what texture layouts are available for you to use.

## Getting the supported layouts

- **cp_layer_renderer_capabilities_supported_layouts_count**: Returns the number of layouts the layer supports.
- **cp_supported_layouts_options**: The options you can pass to functions that relate to rendering capabilities and layout support.
